text_block_list.text: Upon one certain journey ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——Hey Gramps, you alright?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to eat this. As they say, "A journey 
is about the companions, and the world is 
about compassion" right?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
What? You've never heard of it?? 
Haha! Well, that's all good!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, this is quite an interesting place. 
Why are all the trees surrounded by wedges?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…I see, so it's a local custom that happens 
on the 14th of Feb, a ritual to bless couples 
on their journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I see, that's rather romantic. Y'know, Japan 
also has a Valentine's day custom ——

text_block_list.name: Stego Student Fan A
text_block_list.text: Stego-senpai! Please, accept my feelings…!

text_block_list.name: Stego Student Fan B
text_block_list.text:
My oath to forever support you is contained 
within these chocolates! Please……!

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, please direct all gifts to Big Sis into the 
box. You may leave all correspondence to me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, it's the 14th…… 
No wonder I'm feeling a little nostalgic.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Where did I put that stuff from back then?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If I remember correctly, that Grandpa 
definitely gave me a full set of the tools ——

Valentine's Day at the academy buzzed with 
feelings of happiness, bashful glances, and 
bittersweet exchanges.
Yet on this very day I ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Aaand there we go. 
The soil should be just about ready now.
choice_data_list: Why are you out here levelling the soil…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, the soil froze over during winter. 
You gotta prepare the soil like this first.
choice_data_list: No not that, why today of all days…?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's only meaningful because it's done 
today. Ceremonies have certain conditions 
you need to fulfill first!
choice_data_list: Yeah, so then what's all this!?

text_block_list.text:
I paused her for a moment to find out what 
she was doing, and it seems that there was a 
certain ritual she wanted to try out after 
hearing about it on one of her journeys.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's a special ritual carried out on the 14th 
of February, and it seems that it's for couples 
to wish for blessings for a journey ahead.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
We're both comrades on our continuing 
journey right? Not a bad idea to give this 
a go then.
choice_data_list: …Blessings for a journey …Sounds good

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Right? I knew you'd say something like that!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright, the soil is level now. Let's begin.
choice_data_list: What are the steps for this ritual?
What are the steps for this ritual?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To put it simply, we're just planting the 
seed of a tree —— only there's a few special 
steps to follow.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
First, the two participants will insert 
wedges around the area they decide 
to plant the seeds.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Then, the two will take turns knocking in 
the wedges. It seems that for whose turn 
it is, they will have to say a wish for their 
upcoming journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, no need to think too hard about it. 
Let's give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Hmm, I guess I'll start by wishing for a safe journey ahead.

I copied Stay Gold's movements, struck the 
wedge and voiced a wish for our journey.
choice_data_list: For you to enter many thrilling races
For you to enter many thrilling races

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That and ——journeys, y'know, they have to 
be fun.
choice_data_list: For you to enjoy this journey freely
For you to enjoy this journey freely

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——Say, you're not making any wishes for 
yourself are you?

Her comment made me only just realize it, 
but it's true. My wishes for her journey to 
become even better… It comes directly 
from the bottom of my heart.
choice_data_list: I'm properly voicing my own wishes

text_block_list.text:
Repositioning myself to hit the wedge again, 
I announce my wish, "To follow you along 
your Golden Journey…"
choice_data_list: $(scale 95)and, to forever watch over you by your side

text_block_list.text:
Repositioning myself to hit the wedge again, 
I announce my wish, "To follow you along 
your Golden Journey…"
choice_data_list: $(scale 95)and, to forever watch over you by your side

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
For this journey ——to never end, no matter 
where it goes.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've made a wedge circle in the 
soil, we can now pick the seed we're going 
to plant.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the roots will grow strong, the 
leaves will flourish and the wishes upon the 
wedges will be granted. The tree will watch 
over our journey.
choice_data_list: It's amazing… What seed are we picking?
It's wonderful… What are we growing?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The Sorbus Aucuparia, also known as the 
Rowan. It's a tree that apparently watches 
over travellers to keep them from getting lost.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Since you can also make jam or jelly with 
the berries, the director said it was alright 
to grow them at the edge of the fields.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: We sow the seeds and cover them with soil.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Heheh, working together like this is the best.
choice_data_list: You're right… Or perhaps

text_block_list.text:
A ritual where we express our wishes 
together for our endless journey, 
something about this is……
choice_data_list: (Greater than a wish, it's moreso a prayer)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright, since we covered the top with loose 
leaves, there should be no worries with frost.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hm? You alright, Trainer?
choice_data_list: No, it's nothing at all

text_block_list.text:
We completed the ritual, and we can 
check the seeds again another time.

"For our journey to be blessed with 
happiness from now on." If I quietly 
pray right now ——

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Is there anyone with chocolate～～! 
Trick or Choco～～!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's happening, Golshi. 
A Valentine's and Halloween double pincer?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You betterrr give me chocolate～～ 
Otherwise its a tuna fishing rendezvous with 
me on my Golden Valentine Vessel～

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, c'mon Stego～? 
Trick orーー
choice_data_list: H-H-Have this!

text_block_list.text:
I opened the bag of chocolates I had 
on me and handed one to Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhhh! Bite-sized chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, you had chocolates on you 
all this time?
choice_data_list: Well… I thought of sharing them with you
Well… I thought of sharing them with you

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, so it was like that.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'll be confiscating this then. 
How unfortunate for you Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty then, I'm leaving this 
tree in your care Trainer.

Now that she said this, I only just realized… 
Stay Gold would probably be heading off 
on journeys quite frequently from now on.

Extremely free-spirited——but that's just 
how she is.
choice_data_list: Leave it to me, I'll become it's protector!
Leave it to me, I'll become it's protector!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Aah, thanks. I know you'll raise it up to 
become a great tree.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……Hey, protector of the tree. I'm looking 
forward to seeing it grow big and strong.
choice_data_list: $(scale 95)So you can make jam or jelly from this?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah of course. That's why when that 
time comes, let's savour it together.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——I've gained yet another thing to look 
forward to on my journey.
(Grumble Grumble)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuhah! What was that? The berries haven't even started growing yet!
choice_data_list: S-S-Sorry……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
True, doing some hard labour might make you 
kinda hungry——— ah.

I felt the sensation of something stiff on my 
lips, and within the next second, my nose 
tickled with the smell of something sweet.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Happy Valentine's. 
——Just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That being said, there's no way a single 
chocolate can fill you up.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's go on a journey to find something 
tasty Trainer!
